title: Visual Items
description: A small recourcepack the gives more informations about Items by textures using OF/CIT
body:
This is my recourcepack. There are many like it, but this one is mine.

# Content
A small recourcepack I am working on for making things more clear by representing attributes by textures.

- For example the ominous bottle texture changes with the level it has
- Axolotl in a Bucket has the correct color instead of the default one
- Some enchantments are represented on the item sprite (pickaxes for now)
- Goat Horns are decorated with different materials to keep them apart
